mainMenu.aboutAppText:
@:appName is a web app for building and browsing multilingual, project-based dictionaries. It loads structured data from JSON, supports Markdown content, multimedia, and offers fast text search with configurable fuzziness.



It works offline (PWA) and supports flexible data types and presentation, including images and audio.



Data format: content lives in a simple Excel spreadsheet (XLSX) and a plain folder structure for media. You can compile them into a single data.json with the built-in importer.



Originally created for the *Plants mo Pipol blong Vanuatu* research project. Developed and maintained by **Dominik M. Ramík** — [dominicweb.eu](https://dominicweb.eu).



Source code and issues: [github.com/dominik-ramik/linguanabanga](https://github.com/dominik-ramik/linguanabanga).

languageSelectorView.hintNoSelection: No dictionary is selected. Select one or more dictionaries to display.
languageSelectorView.autoOfflineReadyTitle: Keep selected dictionaries ready for offline use
languageSelectorView.autoOfflineReadyDesc: Text content is always available offline. Enable this to also download images and audio for your selected dictionaries, so you can use them without an internet connection.
languageSelectorView.autoOfflineReadyWarning: Images and recordings may not be available offline.
languageSelectorView.selectMoreText: Do you want to select more dictionaries?

projectSelectionDialog.selectHint: Select one or several dictionaries you want to search through
